subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit and are worthy of Him Who is the Desire of earth and heaven, Whose Will is all-encompassing and Whose Purpose is all-pervading [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مقصود ارض و سما را لایق و سزاست که اراده اش مهیمن و مشیتش نافذ بوده
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @Muhammad; Islam, @transcendence; unknowability of God
